name: waybackurls
summary: Repository indexing entry for the ``waybackurls`` project. Tool in the OSINT category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/waybackurls && python3 waybackurls.py --help`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/waybackurls && cat README.md`; `cd toolboxes/waybackurls && ls -la`. Repository indexing entry for the ``waybackurls`` project. Tool in the OSINT category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web] in the OSINT category.
documentation.why_to_use: Use when its cataloged capabilities match the chain planner need (tags: osint, toolbox, github, unknown, lang:go).

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Index entry in the OSINT category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.
Pairs with the OSINT system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.
Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.
Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.
Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.
